incident: Cascading liquidation: Token being sold on DEX is also posted as collateral in a lending protocol with health factor < 1.5
label: H1_positive

incident: Cascading liquidation: Simulated health factor after swap execution drops below 1.0, triggering liquidation
label: H1_positive

incident: Cascading liquidation: Swap's price impact on the AMM pool is large enough to move the oracle price, affecting collateral valuation
label: H1_positive

incident: Cascading liquidation: User followed recommendation -- Deposit additional collateral before executing the swap to maintain safe health factor
label: H1_clean

incident: Correlated oracle dependency: Two or more user positions across different protocols consume the same Chainlink aggregator or oracle contract
label: H2_positive

incident: Correlated oracle dependency: Shared oracle has a heartbeat > 1 hour or deviation threshold > 1%, meaning stale prices persist longer
label: H2_positive

incident: Correlated oracle dependency: Oracle aggregator has fewer than 5 active data sources, increasing manipulation risk
label: H2_positive

incident: Correlated oracle dependency: User followed recommendation -- Spread positions across protocols that use different oracle providers or oracle configurations
label: H2_clean

incident: Concentrated protocol exposure: One protocol holds >50% of user's total DeFi portfolio value
label: H3_positive

incident: Concentrated protocol exposure: User's assets interact with fewer than 3 unique protocol contract systems
label: H3_positive

incident: Concentrated protocol exposure: Concentrated protocol has upgradeable contracts controlled by a multisig with <5 signers or a timelock <24h
label: H3_positive

incident: Concentrated protocol exposure: User followed recommendation -- Redistribute positions across multiple protocols to cap any single protocol at 30-40% of portfolio
label: H3_clean

incident: Approval chain risk: Token approved to protocol A (unlimited or high allowance) is also posted as collateral in protocol B
label: H4_positive

incident: Approval chain risk: Approval to protocol A was set >90 days ago and has not been used recently, suggesting forgotten exposure
label: H4_positive

incident: Approval chain risk: Protocol A has no recent audit or has known vulnerabilities flagged by security researchers
label: H4_positive

incident: Approval chain risk: User followed recommendation -- Revoke token approvals for protocols no longer actively used, especially those overlapping with collateral
label: H4_clean

incident: Flash loan attack surface: Lending position health factor is between 1.0 and 1.15, making it cheaply liquidatable after small price movement
label: H5_positive

incident: Flash loan attack surface: Collateral token's price oracle can be moved >2% with <$1M of capital in the reference AMM pool
label: H5_positive

incident: Flash loan attack surface: Liquidation bonus exceeds the cost of price manipulation plus flash loan fee, making the attack profitable
label: H5_positive

incident: Flash loan attack surface: The collateral token or lending market has been targeted by flash loan attacks in the past 90 days
label: H5_positive

incident: Flash loan attack surface: User followed recommendation -- Add collateral or repay debt to push health factor above 1.5, making price manipulation cost exceed liquidation profit
label: H5_clean
